source_table_capabilities.admissions_core: ICU/MCU admission rows, gender, grouped age/weight/height, origin/destination, stay boundary, and date-of-death fields.
source_table_capabilities.numericitems_event: high-volume bedside numeric observations, blood gases, routine labs, device settings, and numeric intake/output records.
source_table_capabilities.listitems_event: categorical/ordinal bedside states, admission context, retrospective score/admin fields, and selected support or assessment states.
source_table_capabilities.drugitems_event: medication and continuous infusion records, including vasoactive support and fluid inputs.
source_table_capabilities.processitems_interval: start-stop process/device intervals, including ventilation/RRT/tracheostomy-adjacent states.
source_table_capabilities.procedureorderitems_event: procedure/order workflow records, not a full hospital CPOE equivalent.
source_table_capabilities.freetextitems_event: free-text events, useful for bounded review only.
source_table_capabilities.amsterdam_item_dictionary_legacy: official legacy item dictionary mirror used for item-level source search.
